name: happy-spring-tomcat
description: Happy debugging for Spring projects (legacy) on Tomcat.

commands.title: Happy Spring Tomcat: Apply Debug Setup

happySpringTomcat.httpPort.markdownDescription: Tomcat HTTP м»Өл„Ҙн„° нҸ¬нҠё (`server.xml`мқҳ HTTP Connector port)

happySpringTomcat.debugPort.markdownDescription: JPDA л””лІ„к·ё нҸ¬нҠё (VS Codeк°Җ attach н•  нҸ¬нҠё)

happySpringTomcat.preLaunchBuild.markdownDescription:
Tomcat мӢңмһ‘ м „ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң л№Ңл“ңлҘј мӢӨн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- `none`: л№Ңл“ң м•Ҳ н•Ё
- `maven`: `mvn package -DskipTests` мӢӨн–ү
- `gradle`: `./gradlew build -x test` мӢӨн–ү

happySpringTomcat.javaOpts.markdownDescription: `JAVA_OPTS` нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳ. Tomcat мӢңмһ‘ мӢң JVMм—җ м „лӢ¬лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

happySpringTomcat.colorizeLogs.markdownDescription:
лЎңк·ё л ҲлІЁлі„ мғүмғҒмңјлЎң м¶ңл Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. (PowerShell кё°л°ҳ)  
рҹҹЈ `FATAL/CRITICAL` вҶ’ Magenta  
рҹ”ҙ `ERROR/SEVERE/мӢ¬к°Ғ/Exception` вҶ’ Red  
рҹҹЎ `WARN/WARNING/кІҪкі ` вҶ’ Yellow  
рҹҹ  `SQL/Hikari/Query` вҶ’ DarkYellow  
рҹҹў `HTTP/Mapping/Dispatching` вҶ’ Green  
рҹ”ө `INFO/м •ліҙ/Started` вҶ’ Cyan  
рҹ”№ `DEBUG/debug` вҶ’ Blue  
рҹ‘Ө `TRACE/trace` вҶ’ DarkCyan

happySpringTomcat.autoOpenBrowser.markdownDescription: нҶ°мәЈмқҙ м„ұкіөм ҒмңјлЎң мӢңмһ‘лҗҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң лёҢлқјмҡ°м ҖлҘј м—ҪлӢҲлӢӨ.

happySpringTomcat.showStatusBarIcon.markdownDescription: мғҒнғң н‘ңмӢңмӨ„м—җ рҹҡҖ нҶ°мәЈ лӢЁм¶• л©”лүҙ м•„мқҙмҪҳмқ„ н‘ңмӢңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

happySpringTomcat.docBase.markdownDescription:
Tomcatмқҙ м„ңл№ҷн•  **мӣ№м•ұ лЈЁнҠё л””л үнҶ лҰ¬** (л№Ңл“ңлҗң war лҳҗлҠ” exploded нҸҙлҚ”)  
мҳҲ: `${workspaceFolder}/target/exploded`. [нҸҙлҚ” м„ нғқ...](command:happy-spring-tomcat.selectDocBase)

happySpringTomcat.sourceBase.markdownDescription:
**JSP/м •м Ғ нҢҢмқј** н•« лҰ¬лЎңл“ңмҡ© мҶҢмҠӨ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ (`webAppMount="/"`)  
л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ PreResourcesлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

happySpringTomcat.classesBase.markdownDescription:
**Java нҒҙлһҳмҠӨ** н•« лҰ¬лЎңл“ңмҡ© м»ҙнҢҢмқј м¶ңл Ҙ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ (`webAppMount="/WEB-INF/classes"`)  
л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ PreResourcesлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

happySpringTomcat.jndiResources.markdownDescription:
Context лӮҙл¶Җм—җ мЈјмһ…н•  JNDI `<Resource>` м •мқҳ лӘ©лЎқ.  
`settings.json`м—җм„ң м§Ғм ‘ нҺём§‘н•ҳм„ёмҡ”.  

**мҳҲмӢң:**
```json
"happySpringTomcat.jndiResources": [
  {
    "name": "jdbc/myDB",
    "auth": "Container",
    "type": "javax.sql.DataSource",
    "factory": "org.apache.tomcat.dbcp.dbcp2.BasicDataSourceFactory",
    "driverClassName": "oracle.jdbc.OracleDriver",
    "url": "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:ORCL",
    "username": "user",
    "password": "pass",
    "maxActive": "100",
    "maxIdle": "50",
    "maxWait": "-1"
  }
]
```

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
